name: Night City
short_description: "Night City" is a cooperative first-person horror game with survival elements, here you will play as one of the company's clones, and go down into the dungeons to search for resources. Death will be waiting at every step, so work as a team.
detailed_description:
Night City is a cooperative first-person game for 1-4 players. Here you will have to play as one of the company clones, and go down into the dungeons to search for resources.
Here from the unknown anomaly appeared abyss, where many worlds merged together, as well as there appeared the most dangerous monsters from different worlds.
Also there appeared valuable things from different worlds, which are collected by the corporation with the help of clones.

Play together with your friends.

Gather your friends, and play in teams of up to four people.

Explore the dungeon.

In the dungeon from the anomaly you can encounter both ancient labyrinths and modern buildings that got there.

Assign roles, and work as a team.

You have only one pair of hands, so to change an item you will need to get it out of your inventory. To avoid having to go through your inventory all the time, assign roles.

Make new items from the items you find.

Combine items to not only get a new thing, but also to free up space in the inventory. After all, your inventory is not bottomless.

Study monsters.

Monsters that got into this world no one has not yet studied, so their floods, strengths and weaknesses you will have to study their own forces.

Beware of anomalies.

Anomalies can be very dangerous, beware of them, because some of them do not forgive mistakes.

Stock up on supplies.

You won't be able to survive for long without food and water, and it's hard to find supplies in a dungeon. Stock up on supplies in advance so that you don't die of hunger or thirst while exploring.

Do not go alone.

Go as a team, because in a team is not only more fun, but also safer. And also in case of your death your friends will be able to pick up your things.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Russian, Japanese
